task_completion.description: Verify that the 4HHB structure file in PDB format was downloaded to the Downloads folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window or terminal showing the ~/Downloads directory containing a file named '4HHB.pdb' (or similar standard PDB filename for 4HHB).

task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Protein Research' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Firefox browser's bookmarks toolbar, sidebar, or library window for a folder explicitly named 'Protein Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the summary pages for 4HHB, 1MBN, and 1FDH are bookmarked inside the 'Protein Research' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open view of the 'Protein Research' bookmark folder showing saved links to the RCSB PDB pages for 4HHB, 1MBN, and 1FDH.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON report was created at '~/Documents/protein_structures.json'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, terminal, or text editor showing a file named 'protein_structures.json' located in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON file uses the PDB IDs as top-level keys and includes the required nested keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the JSON file. It must have '4HHB', '1MBN', and '1FDH' as the main keys. Inside each, there must be keys for 'title', 'classification', 'method', and 'resolution_angstroms' (which must be formatted as a number, not a string).

task_completion.description: Verify that the data inside the JSON report is accurate based on the RCSB PDB database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the values in the JSON file. 4HHB should have resolution 1.74, method X-RAY DIFFRACTION, classification OXYGEN TRANSPORT. 1MBN should have resolution 2.0, method X-RAY DIFFRACTION, classification OXYGEN STORAGE. 1FDH should have resolution 2.5, method X-RAY DIFFRACTION, classification OXYGEN TRANSPORT.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used the web browser to visit rcsb.org and research the proteins.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing Firefox open and navigating the RCSB PDB website to view the structure summary pages.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not instantly generate the JSON file without looking up the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there is a logical progression of opening the browser, searching for the PDB IDs, and then writing the data to the JSON file, rather than a single step of pasting pre-computed text.

integrity.description: Verify that the PDB file was genuinely downloaded from the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox download manager popup or a save dialog indicating the file was downloaded from rcsb.org, rather than just an empty file created via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: 4HHB: Resolution 1.74, Method X-RAY DIFFRACTION, Classification OXYGEN TRANSPORT. 1MBN: Resolution 2.0, Method X-RAY DIFFRACTION, Classification OXYGEN STORAGE. 1FDH: Resolution 2.5, Method X-RAY DIFFRACTION, Classification OXYGEN TRANSPORT.
